aucun_client_trouve: No customer found for this search.
poser_question: Ask a question about the portfolio
question_top_risque: Which customers are the most at risk?
question_cross_sell: Which customers should we target for cross-sell?
questions_comprises_intro: The assistant only recognizes the predefined questions above (exact wording) — any other phrasing will return an unrecognized-question message.
question_non_reconnue: I don't understand this question. Try one of the predefined questions above, using the exact same wording.
page_accueil_intro: This dashboard centralizes all information about your dataBank CI customer portfolio. Use the left-hand menu to navigate between pages. Each page answers one specific decision question. Start with the Retention and Risk page if you're handling urgent alerts, or with Customer Portfolio for an overview.
page_portefeuille_intro: This page answers: is my portfolio healthy? The indicators at the top give an immediate diagnosis. The Value vs Engagement chart identifies valuable customers who are disengaging — your retention priorities. The segment summary table guides how advisors should spend their time.
page_comportement_intro: Digital engagement and transaction behavior of customers.
page_retention_intro: Customers at risk of disengagement, prioritized for commercial action.
page_360_intro: Full customer record: profile, behavior, risk, recommended actions.
page_opportunites_intro: Customers to target for cross-sell and upsell.
page_ia_intro: How the risk score is calculated, explained simply.
page_assistant_intro: Ask a natural-language question about the portfolio.
page_admin_intro: Administrator-only area — technical pipeline and log status.
guide_admin: This page is used to check that the data pipeline is running correctly, review logs when an incident occurs, and load a new business data file to recompute all indicators.
alerte_risque_eleve: {pct} of customers show high credit risk — {n} high-value customers need special attention.
alerte_reclamations: {n} customers are at risk of leaving due to an unresolved complaint.
ia_intro_texte_1: Each customer's risk score isn't a black box: it's a weighted sum of 4 business factors, computed by an explicit rules engine.
ia_intro_texte_2: Weight of each factor in the final score:
ia_note_admin: The technical study comparing several machine learning models (AUC, precision, recall metrics) remains available for technical profiles in the Administration tab.
titre_scatter_valeur_engagement: Customer value vs Engagement — each point = 1 customer
annotation_scatter_risque: Red-zone points represent {montant} of at-risk balance
annotation_pyramide: The Premier segment represents {pct_nbi} of total NBI with only {pct_clients} of customers
alerte_risque_solde: {n} customers show high credit risk — they represent {solde} of managed balance.
alerte_portefeuille_sain: Healthy portfolio: only {pct} of customers show high credit risk, well below the vigilance threshold (5%).
upload_intro: Validates the structure of a new starter_dataset.xlsx (10 expected sheets) before any production rollout.
upload_valide: File valid: all 10 sheets are present and non-empty.
upload_instructions: The button below replays the whole pipeline (ingestion, dbt, ML — about 60 seconds) and refreshes the dashboard immediately. The result is then saved automatically: it becomes the reference for every instance, including after a restart or redeploy — no further action needed.
recalcul_succes: Recompute complete and persisted: this file becomes the new reference for every instance, including after a restart.
recalcul_succes_local_seulement: Recompute complete on this instance, but persistence failed (see logs) — the effect will be lost on restart.
alerte_vip_premier: {n} VIP customer(s) (Premier segment) show a critical risk score — {solde} of balance to secure. Recommended action: advisor call within 48h.
alerte_opportunites_accueil: {n} customer(s) show a real cross-sell or upsell opportunity — {montant} of potential net banking income identified. The portfolio also has good news worth acting on.
soustitre_valeur_engagement: Identifies valuable customers who are disengaging
soustitre_solde_moyen_segment: The higher the average balance, the greater the impact of a departure
annotation_contribution_premier: Premier = {pct_clients} of customers but {pct_solde} of balance
guide_comportement: This page answers: who is engaging and who is disengaging? The channel × segment heatmap reveals usage habits. The monthly curve shows the portfolio's overall trend. The recency × digital score scatter identifies customers to prioritize for digital activation.
titre_heatmap_canaux: Usage rate by segment and channel (%)
soustitre_heatmap_canaux: Red = low adoption · Green = high adoption
paradoxe_premier_digital: Paradox identified: the Premier segment shows the lowest mobile app adoption rate ({pct}) despite the highest income. Recommended action: dedicated digital onboarding.
insight_canal_plus_faible: Least-adopted channel: recommended action — dedicated onboarding or targeted communication on this channel for this segment.
axe_score_digital: Digital adoption score (0 = no channel · 3 = all channels)
encadre_tendance_generale: Overall trend: {tendance} · Change: {variation} over the period
guide_retention: This page answers: who am I going to lose this week, and who should I call first? Red alerts require immediate action. The at-risk customer table is exportable — print it before your call session. A score above 70 means urgent intervention; 40 to 70 means monitor and offer a loyalty deal.
alerte_prioritaire_bandeau: PRIORITY ALERT — {n} VIP customer(s) at risk of leaving · Balance at stake: {solde} · Action: advisor call within 48h
encadre_zone_rouge: The {n} customers in the red zone represent {montant} of managed balance. These are your priority calls.
encadre_reclamations_risque: Unresolved complaints are correlated with departure risk.
aucun_client_zone: No customer currently in this zone.
guide_360: This page prepares your call before reaching out to a customer. Search by name, ID, or segment. The record shows at a glance: risk score, products held, recent behavior, and a personalized recommendation.
guide_opportunites: This page answers: who can take which product this week? Opportunities are ranked by acceptance probability and potential value. Focus on opportunities in the top-right of the chart — high probability AND high value.
encadre_matrice_opportunites: Focus your efforts on offers in the green zone (top right).
guide_ia: This page documents how risk scores are calculated. The variable importance chart explains which customer signals matter most. The ROC curve measures model quality.
encadre_transparence_ia: The scores shown come from a weighted rules engine trained on {n} customers (including {pct} of sector reference data). They measure behavioral disengagement risk. AUC = {auc} — this score is indicative and will be recalibrated as the data history grows.
titre_feature_importance: Contribution of each variable to the risk score
encadre_feature_importance: The variable "{variable}" is the most predictive signal for the risk score.
encadre_roc: At this threshold, of 10 customers flagged as at risk, several truly are (indicative precision).
note_scenarios: Scenario A (real data) metrics are indicative on a small sample. Scenario B includes clearly marked synthetic reference data.
action_ia_rouge: {n} customers score > 70 · Balance at stake: {montant} · Action: advisor call within 48h
action_ia_ambre: {n} customers score 40-70 · Balance at stake: {montant} · Action: personalized loyalty offer
action_ia_vert: {n} customers score < 40 · Cross-sell potential: {montant} · Action: targeted commercial offer
soustitre_portefeuille: Portfolio composition, value, and financial health
soustitre_comportement: Transaction activity, channels used, and trends
soustitre_retention: Disengagement alerts and customer departure signals
soustitre_360: Full customer record — advisor call preparation
soustitre_opportunites: Identifying and prioritizing cross-sell and upsell actions
rechercher_client_placeholder: Search by name, reference, city or segment...
plusieurs_resultats: {n} customers found — select a row to open the record.
selectionner_client_liste: Select a customer from the list above to open their record.
suggestion_clients_risque: No search in progress — here are the 10 highest-risk customers. Use the bar above to search for a specific customer.
aucune_transaction: No transaction recorded for this customer.
aucune_interaction: No interaction recorded for this customer.
aucune_reclamation_ouverte_client: No open complaint for this customer.
script_appel_urgent: Hello {nom}, I'm reaching out because we noticed {jours} days without activity on your account. Can I help resolve an issue or better meet your needs?
script_appel_fidelisation: Hello {nom}, I'm calling to check in on your satisfaction and present an offer tailored to your profile.
script_appel_opportunite: Hello {nom}, based on your profile I think {offre} could interest you. Do you have a few minutes to discuss it?
raison_opportunite: Low risk score ({score}/100) — favorable profile for a commercial proposal
alerte_reclamations_client: {n} open complaint(s) — see the detail below.
